hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Replace manual boilerplate methods with Lombok annotations to reduce code verbosity.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.before: public Student(long id, String sname, int sage) { ... } public long getId() { ... } ...

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Explicitly define the primary key generation strategy using JPA annotations.
Add JPA relationship fields (OneToOne, OneToMany, ManyToMany) to the entity model.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.after: @OneToOne private Passport passport; @OneToMany private List<Laptop> laptops; @ManyToMany private List<ClassRoom> classRooms;

hibernate/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Project Lombok dependency to enable annotation-based boilerplate reduction.

hibernate/src/main/resources/hibernate.c.general_idea: Changed the schema generation strategy from update to create to ensure a fresh database schema on startup.
Enabled SQL statement logging and formatting for better debugging visibility.
Explicitly set the PostgreSQL dialect to ensure correct SQL generation for the target database.
